description: 移除 Echoe MySQL 外键约束，改为业务 ID + Service 事务维护关系完整性，一次性切换完成，不做数据迁移与兼容分支。

userStories.title: Remove Drizzle references in Echoe schema
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I want all Echoe schema relations represented by fields and indexes instead of .references() so schema no longer defines database foreign keys.
acceptanceCriteria: Remove all .references() usage from apps/server/src/db/schema/echoe-notes.ts, echoe-cards.ts, echoe-revlog.ts, echoe-decks.ts, and echoe-templates.ts
Keep relation columns as varchar(191) business ID fields and preserve required indexes for relation lookups
grep '\.references\(' apps/server/src/db/schema returns no Echoe relation references
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add idempotent foreign-key drop migration
userStories.description: As a release engineer, I want one migration that removes all existing Echoe foreign keys safely so runtime DB structure matches schema definitions.
acceptanceCriteria: Create migration logic that discovers target FK constraints via information_schema and drops only existing constraints
Cover all 8 FK relations listed in PRD section 4.1
Repeated migration execution is idempotent and does not fail when constraints are already absent
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement Note service relation validation
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I want note write paths to validate related business IDs so note create/update rejects invalid mid references.
acceptanceCriteria: In apps/server/src/services/echoe-note.service.ts, create/update note paths validate mid existence within the same uid
Invalid relation returns explicit 4xx business error with relation field context
No numeric ID casting is introduced for relation validation
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement Deck service relation validation
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I want deck write paths to validate conf and mid references so deck create/update enforces same-uid relation integrity.
acceptanceCriteria: In apps/server/src/services/echoe-deck.service.ts, create/update deck validates conf and optional mid within the same uid
Update behavior follows PRD FR-2 matrix and returns 4xx for invalid relations
Deck relation checks execute without compatibility branch or dual-write logic
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement Config service relation validation
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I want config-domain writes to validate template/notetype/deck-config relations so config service enforces FR-2 integrity rules.
acceptanceCriteria: In apps/server/src/services/echoe-config.service.ts, template create/update validates ntid and optional did with uid scope
Deck-config and notetype related write paths validate required upstream objects with uid scope
Relation validation failures return explicit 4xx errors
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement Study service relation validation
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I want study-domain writes to validate card/revlog relations so cid and dependent IDs are always checked within uid scope.
acceptanceCriteria: In apps/server/src/services/echoe-study.service.ts, revlog creation validates cid existence in same uid
Any study write path that accepts relation IDs validates against business ID columns without cross-tenant leakage
Invalid relations return explicit 4xx business errors
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Align import services with relation validation
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I want import pipelines to follow the same relation-validation rules so imported data does not bypass FR-2 checks.
acceptanceCriteria: Update apps/server/src/services/echoe-import.service.ts and echoe-csv-import.service.ts write paths to enforce same-uid relation checks
Imported card/note/template/deck records fail fast with explicit errors when upstream objects are missing
No compatibility branch or data backfill logic is introduced in import flow
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement Note owner delete transaction
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I want note deletion to be a single transaction so note -> card -> revlog cascade is explicit and rollback-safe.
acceptanceCriteria: In apps/server/src/services/echoe-note.service.ts, delete note runs as one transaction with uid-scoped conditions
Deleting a note removes dependent cards and revlogs according to PRD FR-3
Any step failure triggers full rollback
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement Deck owner delete transaction
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I want deck deletion to run with explicit cascade semantics so cards are deleted and template did is set null in one transaction.
acceptanceCriteria: In apps/server/src/services/echoe-deck.service.ts, delete deck runs in one transaction with uid-scoped conditions
Deleting a deck deletes related cards and sets templates.did to null
Any step failure triggers full rollback
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement Card owner delete transaction
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I want card deletion in study domain to explicitly delete revlogs so card -> revlog cascade no longer depends on DB foreign keys.
acceptanceCriteria: In apps/server/src/services/echoe-study.service.ts, deleting card triggers uid-scoped revlog cleanup within one transaction
Card delete flow follows FR-3 mapping for revlog cascade
Any step failure triggers full rollback
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement Config owner delete transactions
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I want notetype and deck-config deletions owned by config service so cascades and set-null rules are explicit and transaction-safe.
acceptanceCriteria: In apps/server/src/services/echoe-config.service.ts, delete notetype performs: delete notes, delete templates, set decks.mid null (uid scoped)
In apps/server/src/services/echoe-config.service.ts, delete deck_config deletes related decks and triggers downstream cascades
Both delete flows run in one transaction and rollback on failure
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add structured logging for relation operations
userStories.description: As an operator, I want structured logs for relation validation and cascade execution so failures and affected rows are observable in production.
acceptanceCriteria: Use @echoe/logger in relation validation and delete-cascade flows (no console logging)
Logs include at least event, uid, rootObject, targetField, targetId, affectedRows, result, and durationMs
Logging is added to note/deck/study/config service relation-critical paths
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add regression tests for FR-2 and FR-3
userStories.description: As a backend maintainer, I want automated tests for relation validation and cascade semantics so foreign-key removal is protected by regression coverage.
acceptanceCriteria: Add/extend tests covering FR-2 create/update validation matrix and immutable-field behavior
Add/extend tests covering FR-3 cascade semantics, set-null behavior, and transaction rollback
Include cross-tenant negative cases to prove uid isolation
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Run quality gates and verify FK-free schema
userStories.description: As a release engineer, I want final quality and schema verification completed so the Big Bang rollout can ship without compatibility or data-migration tasks.
acceptanceCriteria: Run and pass backend quality gates required by PRD (tests, lint, typecheck)
Verify target Echoe tables report zero FOREIGN KEY constraints after migration
Confirm rollout does not add data migration/backfill scripts or compatibility branches
Typecheck passes
